overall.description: A static cinematic shot of a gothic great hall interior from a video game, featuring high vaulted ceilings, stone walls, and students in robes seated at wooden tables. Natural light streams through tall arched windows, illuminating the central aisle where a figure stands.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with dining tables and students

agents.ego_description: stationary viewpoint observing the great hall interior and the students within

notable_agents.action: standing in the central aisle facing away from camera toward the far end of the hall
student in dark robes sitting at wooden table reading a book

entered.detail: high vaulted ceiling with exposed dark wooden beams and trusses
tall pointed-arch windows with intricate tracery allowing bright natural light to enter
grey stone walls adorned with framed portraits and tapestries
large iron ring chandelier hanging from the ceiling with multiple candle holders
long wooden tables with benches arranged in rows
ornate blue and red patterned carpet running down the central aisle
raised wooden counter or serving area along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady view of a gothic great hall interior, with natural light streaming through tall arched windows on the right. Students in dark robes sit at wooden tables on either side of a central aisle, where a figure stands facing the far end of the hall. High vaulted ceilings with exposed wooden beams and hanging iron chandeliers dominate the space above stone walls decorated with portraits.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze across a gothic great hall, capturing the stillness of a scholarly sanctuary. It begins by framing the vast interior, where natural light streams through tall arched windows to illuminate the stone walls and portraits. As the eye travels deeper into the space, the view encompasses students in dark robes seated at wooden tables flanking a central aisle. The perspective then lifts toward the high vaulted ceilings, where exposed wooden beams and hanging iron chandeliers dominate the upper reaches of the hall. Finally, the camera settles on a lone figure standing in the aisle, facing the distant end of the grand chamber.
